product_highlights: DOWSIL™ silicone range — industry-standard sensory modifiers and emollients for personal care
XIAMETER® silicones — broad portfolio of commodity and specialty silicones at competitive value
Silicone elastomers delivering a unique, cushiony skin feel and enhanced spreadability
Long-wear film former systems for foundation, mascara, and sunscreen formulations
Silicone alternatives meeting growing demand for sustainable, silicone-free formulations
notes: Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care that spans virtually every category. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients used in premium skincare, color cosmetics, and hair care worldwide. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly prized for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve formulation spreadability. As demand for silicone alternatives grows, Dow is also investing in hybrid and organic alternatives that deliver comparable sensory benefits with improved sustainability credentials.
